calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-13-2023 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment Prove-Up; Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Feb-22-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for motion for default prove-up hearing.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:50:20 a.m. and concluding at 11:04:48 a.m.

Plaintiff LCS Capital, LLC. represented by Kelsey Thwaits, Esq. via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Amber T Garay not appearing.
Defendant Jeannie Rodrigues not appearing.

ERICA STAWIARSKI is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff.

Court has reviewed the case and all filings pertaining to this hearing.
Counsel for Plaintiff presents outline and summary of case.

ERICA STAWIARSKI is examined by the Court. Witness attests that statements made by its counsel are true and correct.

The matter is submitted.
Based on the summary of the case, comments made by Plaintiff's Counsel, and the affirmation of Plaintiff's witness, the Court finds that Defendant is in breach of contract to Plaintiff for failure to pay funds to Plaintiff.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff LCS Capital., and against Defendants Amber T Garay and Jeannie Rodrigues, as follows:

1. Damages: $39,743.10
2. Attorney Fees: Denied
3. Costs: Denied

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $39,743.10

Proposed judgment signed as modified and filed. (D505)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
